name: tandem_repeat_beta_satellite
description: Beta satellite (Sau3A family): 68 bp GC-rich tandem repeat clustered on the short arms (p-arms) of the five acrocentric chromosomes (13, 14, 15, 21, 22) and on chromosome 9 and the Y. Found adjacent to rDNA arrays in the satellite stalk and nucleolus organiser region. Short monomer drives low Shannon entropy; higher GC than alpha satellite distinguishes the two.
